LanguageData.GodHand_GearboxGenerator.label: Hand Crank Gearbox Generator
LanguageData.GodHand_GearboxGenerator.description: A complex mechanical device that converts hand crank power into industrial electricity. Consists of a cross gearbox and a large cantilever.
LanguageData.GodHand_EndRodGenerator.label: Otherworld's Perpetual Motion Machine
LanguageData.GodHand_EndRodGenerator.description: An advanced generator from another world, which can be used to anchor biological entities.
LanguageData.GodHand_TurretHead.label: Turret Headwear
LanguageData.GodHand_TurretHead.description: The top section of a turret, now repurposed as a defensive headwear through advanced manipulation.\n\nWarning: Wearing this provides significant protection but may cause others to mistake you for a mobile bunker.
LanguageData.GodHand_TurretBase.label: Unstable Turret Base
LanguageData.GodHand_TurretBase.description: The remains of a turret base after its upper section was forcibly detached. The structure is critically unstable and nearing collapse.
LanguageData.GodHand_PawnFlyer.label: God Hand Flight Container
